sentence: 她随口念出一句唐朝诗句。
pinyin: Tā suíkǒu niàn chū yī jù Táng cháo shījù.
english: She casually recited a line of Tang dynasty verse.

sentence: 工厂把生产资料列出了清单。
pinyin: Gōngchǎng bǎ shēngchǎn zīliào lièchūle qīngdān.
english: The factory drew up a list of means of production.

meaning: bottom bracket shell (in a bicycle frame); (Buddhism) the five superna
sentence: 修自行车时，五通部件也要检查一下。
pinyin: Xiū zìxíngchē shí, wǔ tōng bùjiàn yě yào jiǎnchá yīxià.
english: When repairing a bike, you should also check the bottom bracket shell.

meaning: to write as substitute for sb; a ghost writer; plagiarism
sentence: 花钱找人代写论文是违规行为。
pinyin: Huā qián zhǎo rén dài xiě lùnwén shì wéiguī xíngwéi.
english: Paying someone to ghostwrite your thesis is a violation of the rules.

sentence: 他身上一个子儿都没带。
pinyin: Tā shēnshang yī gè zǐ ér dōu méi dài.
english: He didn't have a single penny on him.
